feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RF Gun Error - Quant not consistent with other transfer order data
entry.content:
LE (Logistics Execution) MM (Materials Management) SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Hello SAP Experts,
This is regarding WM consignment stocks in RF Transaction

The Stock Transfer from Non SU Managed Storage Type to SU Managed St Type in RF Handheld (RF gun) is NOT working for WM consignment stocks.

Error Message appears as below while transferring the consignment stock from Non SU Managed St Type to SU Managed St Type,
Quant 000000XXXX not consistent with other transfer order data
Message No. L3 018

Please check and advise how to resolve the error message No. L3 018.

Best Regards,
Kumar Subramaniam

entry.title: Mapping Text ID to Forms - Report, App, CDS View
entry.content:
Dear SAP community, 

Is there an app, report or CDS View available to see the mapping of the Text ID of Header and Item to the Forms?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Profit center when creating returns order for another plant
entry.content:
A customer returns goods to another plant than from where it was bought.

During Customer Returns (CBAR) creation we are changing the line-item plant from X to Y. They expect to see the profitability segment data (plant and profit centre) to be updated/redetermined but this is not happening.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Upper limit for SKTO cash discount at material per unit level in billing document
entry.content:
We are using SKTO condition type to calculate the cash discount from the payment terms in the customer master record. However, we got a requirement to limit the calculated cash discount value (for example to 10 USD) for every unit of the material. Below is the illustration:

 

Item 1 - Material XYZ - Qty 10 - Per unit price is 100 USD - Cash discount percentage is 6%
So calculated cash discount value per unit is 6 USD and total cash discount for the SO line item 1 is 60 USD.

Item 2 - Material ABC - Qty 10 - Per unit price is 200 USD - Cash discount percentage is 6%
So calculated cash discount per unit is USD 12. But I want to limit this to 10 USD.
So the new cash discount per unit is USD 10 and total cash discount for the SO line item 2 is USD 100.

To achieve this, we tried limiting the condition values in OBV2 (Define upper/lower limits for conditions).
However, this is only restricting the value given in the condition records (VK11) for this condition type.

We also tried the "Maximum Condition value" in VK11 under "Limits for Pricing" section of the condition record. But this amount is not calculated per unit rather is calculated as the total condition value combined for all the sales orders posted against the customer. This is not what we want.

We also tried the "upper limit" value under the "amounts" section of the condition record in VK11, but this too just limits the manual amount given in the sales order against the condition type but not the calculated value.

Is there a way in the standard pricing to limit the calculated value per unit of the item?

Also, if SKTO doesn't has that functionality (as the percentage is taken directly from the payment terms but not the condition record), we are OK to create a new custom condition type for cash discount.

Please help.

entry.title: For reasons of cost management, item 000010 cannot be deletedMessage no. V1128
entry.content:
HI Expert

Fire Urgent Please

I have cancelled my Sale Invoice and PGI ,then i am come back my Sales Order VA02 but system not allowed me to delete the line item on Sales Order. The system is response currently restricting deletion of the line item in the Sales Order

When I am deleting Line item in sale order its giving a message like this "For reasons of cost management, item 000010 cannot be deleted
Message no. V1128

Maintained MRP1 MRP Type ND/PD Both and MRP3, Strategy Group 10/20
Sales Order Type Domestic Dealer Sales

Can anyone explain me about this and can give me solution how to delete this item please??

Thanks 

M.G Rabbani

entry.title: Cross-Selling without Structure HgLevlItm
entry.content:
We want to use cross-selling to add product B when product A is entered in an order (VA01).

This works fine but it adds B as a sub-item with Higher-Level Item = 10.

 

We don't want this - it should be a normal position 10 with no Higher-Level Item. Is there any way to customize this?

Unfortunately, when we use an Enhancement Point (ES_SAPFV45P SAPFV45P Static Enhancement Point/Section \PR:SAPFV45P\EX:VBAP_FUELLEN_10\EI) to clear UEPOS ...

IF vbap-uepvw = 'F'. " Cross-Selling
  CLEAR vbap-uepos. " Don't add cross-selling as sub-positions
ENDIF.

...we lose the quantity (3 was entered):

entry.title: No se determina la cuenta de diferencial para el impuesto (SD)
entry.content:
Somos un grupo de mas de 15 sociedad en varios países. Una de estas está presentando un error a la hora de contabilizar notas de crédito con el siguiente escenario:

  • Moneda USD
  • Material con IVA
  • El tipo de cambio de la nota de crédito es diferente al de la factura asociada

El error que se muestra es el siguiente:

No definida determ. de ctas. para Diferencias de cotización impuestos con claves   en plan de ctas. PILG

Nº mensaje: F5611

Diagnóstico

Al no estar definida la determinación de cuentas para Diferencias de cotización impuestos con las claves   en el plan de cuentas PILG, no se podrá Crear una contabilización automática.

Actividades en el sistema

No se puede contabilizar el documento.

Procedimiento

Dependiendo de la clase de tratamiento, podrá Retener el documento y contabilizarlo posteriormente. Si no fuera posible y no se pudiera subsanar el error en el Customizing a corto plazo, deberá abandonar el tratamiento y volver a registrar el documento más adelante.

El mensaje indica como solución configurar la OBYY, sin embargo, no se considera una solución ya que esta configuración afectaría las demás sociedades, además el resto de sociedades no tienen este problema y el mismo escenario se ejecuta a diario.

Como parte de las pruebas se creó un nuevo documento de NC utilizando como modelo una clase de documento y pedido de ventas de otra sociedad que si funciona, así como su control de copias, y tampoco funcionó.

Se agradecen sus comentarios.

entry.title: BAPI or FM to update Customer Bank details
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

This is too automate updating of Bank details in SAP for customer, Do we have any BAPI or FM to update or any other means to automate the updating process. I have already checked, but did not find any FM, in XD99 we can do a mass update, But I want to automate the process of updating.

Kindly help or suggest possible options

Thanks, Thiru

entry.title: CDS View for Planned Values & Actual Values
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts,

We are looking for a CDS View for our Customer Projects which would help us to get Planned Values and Actual Values subjected to all the projects we have. We tried using - "C_SlsPerfPlanActualQuery" but this CDS view is not yet released and again we are not able to derive this requirement. 

There is SAP Standard Analytical Query App which gives us the fields "Planned Revenue" and "Billed Revenue" which we can consider as "Planned Value and Actual Value". But we are trying create a report which would give the order backlog of these value (i.e Planned Value - Actual Value) and hence we cannot use this Standard report directly. 

If any community experts has more information or idea on this it would be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Edit in the MIGO table?
entry.content: How to add the Material Code in the MIGO table? I want to know if it s possible or not ?

entry.title: Material Substitution in ORDRSP IDoc
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirement is, to substitute a material number in the SalesOrder with a new material. For all communication facing to the customer, we still want to use the old material number. 

I have created a substitution rule in TVSU with SUDRU activated. For printouts, the old material number is used. However, I also want the old material number to be used within Order Confirmation IDocs. 

E1EDP19 segment also seems to have the according qualifiers 008 and 009. 

However, no logic to fill them outbound is implemented. Any ideas if there is a possibility to activate this in SAP standard?

 

kind regards

Harry

entry.title: Sales order item contains a confirmed quantity and has an Embargo assigned
entry.content:
The expectation is, if a sales order item has an embargo block the confirmed quantity will be removed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When using Idoc TXTRAW to send email from the system it is concatenating some of the lines together
entry.content: When using a task to convert and send an email from an inbound Idoc TXTRAW, the email that is sent concatenates some of the lines together. It doesn't show this way when you look at it in SOST. I have been able to duplicate it using the SAPOffice function SO00  that has a document class of RAW. I can copy and past the data from the TXTRAW and it produces the same email as is sent through the task. Is there a configuration that could be changed so the email is formatted correctly? Or a fix that can be applied?

entry.title: Missing handling unit (but the HU number shows up in the document flow)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm having this strange situation where I cannot access HU information from either the delivery document or via HU03.

 

When I try to access via "Display document" button in the document flow, I get no response.

When I try to access the HU information via HU03, I get "Handling units could not be found. Check for typing errors " message.

 

The HU number does show up in the document flow of this delivery document and since we have a change history which suggests that we have once packed items in this delivery document, the HU did exist in the past.

I'd appreciate it if you could tell me why this is occurring?

I'd also appreciate it if you could tell me if it's possible to access deleted handling units via some tables/transaction codes. I could not find this handling units in VEKP/VEPO tables. So I'm assuming that the information was deleted from those tables.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Return order should contain original items only
entry.content:
Requirement: Restrict the addition of new material line items in Return Sales Order that was created with reference to an existing original Invoice. Restrict the increase in quantity of the original items.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SD - Passing Freight Line of $0.00 in tax call
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently, we're facing an issue where our sales documents that are free shipping do not pass a freight line in the tax call.  This only became an issue with the Colorado Retail Delivery Fee.  Normally, not passing a $0.00 wouldn't have been an issue, however now our Tax Engine doesn't return the $0.27 fee because there is no shipping indicator passed in the call.   When I test out adding a freight condition at $0.00 it just isn't included in the call.  Can passing a freight condition at $0.00, be determined in the Sales and Distro configuration?

entry.title: Contact Person Partner Function in sales order processing
entry.content:
Hello There,

Quick question I know we can assign multiple contact person on a sales order processing level.

There is a business requirement that for one customer multiple contact persons are allocated and each contact person can individually place an order from their home-grown ordering system, how this could be possible with SAP?

What's the role of this partner function CP(Contact Person), is it possible for contact person to create a sales order?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Special Delivery for item category
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

We have a business requirement regarding delivery. I want to know if we can set up special delivery rules for item categories. For example:

ZTAN = Can only be delivered individually

ZTAN+TAN = System will throw an error

entry.title: SIC Code in Plant level
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community
I need to find the table/field of SIC code in a plant level. 
Similar to SIC Code for Item level which can be found in MVKE-MVGR1

Thank you

entry.title: How to maintain large number of entries in OVK2/OBAE transaction
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I've one requirement to maintain a large number(more than 4000 entries) of Country/Region entries in OVK2 and OBAE transaction. It is getting saved in a TR.

If anyone had similar requirement or having knowledge how this can be done, please let me know the possible methods to do the same.

Thanks,

Regards,

Akhil

SD (Sales and Distribution)
